title: Rena's Spiders
description: Redesigns the spiders! (Whether they're scarier or cuter...you decide!)
body:
### Fresh Animation version here: [Rena's Spiders x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/project/sHVyi2nX)

![Rena's Spiders Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/034a3d14f6354760125e66c914902f71ea218ee2.png)

# What is this pack?
Changes up the spider textures! Giving both the spider and cave spider a fresh but still familiar design! <3

_*Along with also giving the cave spider a new model if you're using EMF_

_***AND YES THIS ALSO WORKS IN VANILLA, BUT WONT GIVE THEM CUSTOM MODELS AGSJGASJFA**_

## Pack Features

- Updates the Cave Spider and normal Spider textures
- Tweaks the model of the normal Spider to have a slightly raised abdomen [EMF]
- New model and custom textures for the Cave Spider, making it more pixel-accurate and cuter! [EMF]
- Emissive eyes on Cave Spider which use the same brightness as the normal Spiders'! [ETF]

## Extra Tidbits

- Upcoming changes:
  - Improving normal spider colour pallete
  - Support for more versions of MC
  - Support for Better than Adventure!
  - New Icon and theming!
